qids.subject: Programming in C
qids.prose: Consider the following C program: #include<stdio.h> struct Ournode{ char x, y, z; }; int main() { struct Ournode p={'1', '0', 'a'+2}; struct Ournode *q=&p; printf("%c, %c", *((char*)q+1), *((char*)q+2)); return 0; }
